selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a weekly increase in the St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index indicates worsening broad financial stress and favors the diversified SPY exposure, while unchanged or declining stress favors the more growth-sensitive QQQ exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this is an official Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis weekly financial-stress change mechanism and is distinct from the closed level-volatility, credit-price, yield, inflation, growth, labor, production, housing, sentiment, commodity, currency, seasonal and ETF-price mechanisms

signal.source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis ALFRED official real-time-period history
signal.formula: at each cutoff choose the latest PIT-qualified STLFSI4 observation and its exact previous accepted weekly observation; delta=current_index-previous_index
signal.target_rule: delta above zero means SPY weight 1.0; equal or lower means QQQ weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ALFRED realtime_start becomes conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, smoothing, persistence, threshold grid, alternate lag, level filter, price filter, volatility filter or source blend
signal.limitation: STLFSI4 is a revised weekly aggregate financial-stress measure and the sign of its one-week change is a coarse regime proxy

timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the first accepted XNYS session after the conservative signal availability timestamp
timing_and_account.holding: until the next accepted weekly execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical weekly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and cash-distribution accounting
timing_and_account.corporate_action_mode: official historical events are used only for retrospective account reconstruction, never for signal formation or source selection; their current source bytes were retrieved after historical decisions and are not represented as PIT strategy evidence

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 52 intervals, eight of each state, and four transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired weekly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.000000000186264514923095703125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over weekly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(8192000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the thirteen-week block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
